title: Witch Craft Works
sourceNotes: Single-cour, 12 episodes. Manga complete (AniList lists 119 chapters across 17 volumes; some chapter-list aggregators count ~108 due to differing bonus-chapter tallies). The anime adapts roughly the first 29 chapters, climaxing with the manga's 'vs. Weekend' arc (ch. 18-27, vol. 5-6), leaving the bulk of the manga (ch. 30-119) unadapted. Chapter boundaries approximated from volume tables of contents — refine via PR.
